name: St. Peter Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at St. Peter Recreation Center in St. Peter, MN! There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free.
address: 600 S Fifth Street Suite 200. Saint Peter

name: Veterans Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Veterans Memorial Park in St. Peter, MN! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
